title: Avan Ivan
desc: A benevolent landlord embraces two half-brothers as his chosen family, nurturing their dreams, but their lives take a perilous turn when they cross paths with a notorious cattle smuggler.

title: Kadhal Vannile
desc: Ravi and Rakhi are friends with conflicting views on love. However, their worst nightmare comes to life when their siblings fall in love with each other.

title: Ponmanai Thedi
desc: A layabout man falls for his educated cousin, unaware that she is about to marry someone else. His misunderstanding leads to total chaos.

title: Kizhakku Africavil Sheela
desc: An affluent couple ventures into a forest to serve the tribal groups. However, when they unfortunately die, their infant daughter Sheela is left behind and gets nurtured among the wilderness.

title: Alaya Dharsinam
desc: The host visits different temples across the country and sheds light on the cultural and historical significance of the monument.

title: Raj News
desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events.

title: Manathai Varudiya Paadalgal
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular songs from different genres composed by renowned musicians from the industry.

title: Yamanukku Yaman
desc: Sathya reaches the court of Yama after he is killed for exposing the crimes of the village head. When he starts a protest to get his life back, Yama goes on a vacation and grants him his wish.

title: Oyilattam
desc: When a folk dancer is challenged in a performance, he chooses his student to compete on his behalf. However, complications arise when his pupil develops feelings for the challenger.

title: Urimai
desc: Suresh, a playboy, meets Rani and they get married. When Rani gets killed in an accident, Suresh's life becomes miserable. Soon, Rani's lookalike enters Suresh's house, claiming to be his wife.

title: Puthiya Theerpu
desc: Raja, an honest police officer, fights against the evils of society. Later, he gives a new lease of life to Radha and tries to reform a woman, who runs a brothel.

title: Anand
desc: Ananda, a popular singer, desperately seeks to win Latha's affection. Upon finally winning her heart, they decide to marry, but a series of misunderstandings soon separates them.
